research.title: My AI Agents Work 24/7 — What Influencers Actually Mean
research.whyTrending: Influencer claims about 24/7 AI agents are everywhere. Reality is far more nuanced — smart automation of boring tasks, not autonomous engineering.

strategy.angle: Contrarian but fair — not 'AI is useless' but 'here's what actually works vs what's hype'. With real experience and honest assessment.
strategy.title: "My AI Agents Work 24/7" — What Influencers Actually Mean (And What They Don't Tell You)
